content:
The user wants me to extract the table of contents from the provided image.

**1. Identify the document type:**
This is a "Changes" or "Revision History" page from a Texas Instruments datasheet.

**2. Locate the table:**
The main content is a table listing changes made to the document. It has two main sections:
- Changes from Revision A (January 2014) to Revision B (July 2014)
- Changes from Revision * (January 2014) to Revision A (January 2014)

**3. Extract the content:**
I need to transcribe the text and page numbers into a structured format.

*Top Section (General Changes):*
- Changed $V_{OUT} = 5$ V To $V_{OUT} = 3.3$ V in Figure 6-15 ..... 10
- Changed the X axis From: Junction Temperature To: Ambient Temperature in Figure 6-16 ..... 10
- Added a NOTE to the Application and Implementation section ..... 15
- Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 ..... 17
- Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6 + C7$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 ..... 22

*Middle Section (Changes from Revision A to B):*
- Added Feature Description section, Device Functional Modes, Application and Implementation section, Power Supply Recommendations section, Device and Documentation Support section, and Mechanical, Packaging, and Orderable Information section ..... 1
- Changed the data sheet title From: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A Synchronous Step-Down.. To: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down ..... 1
- Changed device number From: TPS563209 To TPS563200 ..... 1
- Changed Features From: 2% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) To: 1% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) ..... 1
- Added the Timing Requirements table ..... 7
- Added Table 8-1 ..... 15
- Changed Table 8-2 ..... 17
- Deleted sentence following Table 8-2 "For higher output voltages, additional phase boost can be achieved by adding a feed forward capacitor (C7) in parallel with R2." ..... 17
- Added Application Information for the TPS563200 device ..... 22
- Added Table 8-3 ..... 22

*Bottom Section (Changes from Revision * to A):*
- Changed the device status From: Product Preview To: Production ..... 1

**4. Format the output:**
I will format this as a Markdown table to preserve the structure.

**5. Verify details:**
- Check page numbers.
- Check text accuracy.
- Ensure all items are included.

The extraction looks complete and accurate. I will now generate the Markdown.
```markdown
|  |  | Page |
| --- | --- | --- |
| • | Changed $V_{OUT} = 5$ V To $V_{OUT} = 3.3$ V in Figure 6-15 | 10 |
| • | Changed the X axis From: Junction Temperature To: Ambient Temperature in Figure 6-16 | 10 |
| • | Added a NOTE to the Application and Implementation section | 15 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6 + C7$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 22 |
| **Changes from Revision A (January 2014) to Revision B (July 2014)** |  | **Page** |
| • | Added Feature Description section, Device Functional Modes, Application and Implementation section, Power Supply Recommendations section, Device and Documentation Support section, and Mechanical, Packaging, and Orderable Information section | 1 |
| • | Changed the data sheet title From: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A Synchronous Step-Down.. To: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down | 1 |
| • | Changed device number From: TPS563209 To TPS563200 | 1 |
| • | Changed Features From: 2% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) To: 1% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) | 1 |
| • | Added the Timing Requirements table | 7 |
| • | Added Table 8-1 | 15 |
| • | Changed Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Deleted sentence following Table 8-2 "For higher output voltages, additional phase boost can be achieved by adding a feed forward capacitor (C7) in parallel with R2." | 17 |
| • | Added Application Information for the TPS563200 device | 22 |
| • | Added Table 8-3 | 22 |
| **Changes from Revision * (January 2014) to Revision A (January 2014)** |  | **Page** |
| • | Changed the device status From: Product Preview To: Production | 1 |
```
Wait, the top part doesn't have a header row in the image, but it functions like a table. I'll format it as a single table for clarity.

Revised plan:
Combine everything into one big table.

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| • | Changed $V_{OUT} = 5$ V To $V_{OUT} = 3.3$ V in Figure 6-15 | 10 |
| • | Changed the X axis From: Junction Temperature To: Ambient Temperature in Figure 6-16 | 10 |
| • | Added a NOTE to the Application and Implementation section | 15 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6 + C7$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 22 |
| **Changes from Revision A (January 2014) to Revision B (July 2014)** |  | **Page** |
| • | Added Feature Description section, Device Functional Modes, Application and Implementation section, Power Supply Recommendations section, Device and Documentation Support section, and Mechanical, Packaging, and Orderable Information section | 1 |
| • | Changed the data sheet title From: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A Synchronous Step-Down.. To: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down | 1 |
| • | Changed device number From: TPS563209 To TPS563200 | 1 |
| • | Changed Features From: 2% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) To: 1% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) | 1 |
| • | Added the Timing Requirements table | 7 |
| • | Added Table 8-1 | 15 |
| • | Changed Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Deleted sentence following Table 8-2 "For higher output voltages, additional phase boost can be achieved by adding a feed forward capacitor (C7) in parallel with R2." | 17 |
| • | Added Application Information for the TPS563200 device | 22 |
| • | Added Table 8-3 | 22 |
| **Changes from Revision * (January 2014) to Revision A (January 2014)** |  | **Page** |
| • | Changed the device status From: Product Preview To: Production | 1 |

This looks good. I will output this markdown.
One small detail: The top section doesn't have a "Page" header explicitly, but the right column is clearly page numbers. I will treat it as a table with 3 columns where the first two are merged for the description.

Actually, looking closely, the top section is just a list with page numbers aligned to the right. It's effectively a table without a header row. I will represent it as such.

Final check of the text:
- "Changed $V_{OUT} = 5$ V To $V_{OUT} = 3.3$ V in Figure 6-15" -> Correct.
- "Changed the X axis From: Junction Temperature To: Ambient Temperature in Figure 6-16" -> Correct.
- "Added a NOTE to the Application and Implementation section" -> Correct.
- "Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2" -> Correct.
- "Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6 + C7$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2" -> Correct.

Middle section:
- "Added Feature Description section, Device Functional Modes, Application and Implementation section, Power Supply Recommendations section, Device and Documentation Support section, and Mechanical, Packaging, and Orderable Information section" -> Correct.
- "Changed the data sheet title From: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A Synchronous Step-Down.. To: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down" -> Correct.
- "Changed device number From: TPS563209 To TPS563200" -> Correct.
- "Changed Features From: 2% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) To: 1% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C)" -> Correct.
- "Added the Timing Requirements table" -> Correct.
- "Added Table 8-1" -> Correct.
- "Changed Table 8-2" -> Correct.
- "Deleted sentence following Table 8-2 "For higher output voltages, additional phase boost can be achieved by adding a feed forward capacitor (C7) in parallel with R2."" -> Correct.
- "Added Application Information for the TPS563200 device" -> Correct.
- "Added Table 8-3" -> Correct.

Bottom section:
- "Changed the device status From: Product Preview To: Production" -> Correct.

Everything seems accurate. I will proceed with generating the response.
One detail: The prompt asks for "markdown format". I will provide the markdown table.
I should also include the footer information if relevant, but usually, just the main content is requested. The prompt says "extract the table", so I will focus on that.

Wait, I should check if there are any other headers.
"TEXAS INSTRUMENTS"
"TPS562200, TPS563200"
"SLVSCBOE – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023"
These are headers, not part of the table. I will exclude them unless they are part of the table structure, which they are not.

The table structure is:
Column 1: Bullet points and descriptions.
Column 2: Page numbers.
There is a section header row "Changes from Revision A (January 2014) to Revision B (July 2014)" which spans the first two columns, and a "Page" header for the third column.
Same for the bottom section.

I will construct the markdown table accordingly.
```markdown
|  |  | Page |
| --- | --- | --- |
| • | Changed $V_{OUT}$ = 5 V To $V_{OUT}$ = 3.3 V in Figure 6-15 | 10 |
| • | Changed the X axis From: Junction Temperature To: Ambient Temperature in Figure 6-16 | 10 |
| • | Added a NOTE to the Application and Implementation section | 15 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6 + C7$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 22 |
| **Changes from Revision A (January 2014) to Revision B (July 2014)** |  | **Page** |
| • | Added Feature Description section, Device Functional Modes, Application and Implementation section, Power Supply Recommendations section, Device and Documentation Support section, and Mechanical, Packaging, and Orderable Information section | 1 |
| • | Changed the data sheet title From: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A Synchronous Step-Down.. To: 4.5 V to 17 V Input, 2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down | 1 |
| • | Changed device number From: TPS563209 To TPS563200 | 1 |
| • | Changed Features From: 2% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) To: 1% Feedback Voltage Accuracy ($25^{\circ}$C) | 1 |
| • | Added the Timing Requirements table | 7 |
| • | Added Table 8-1 | 15 |
| • | Changed Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Deleted sentence following Table 8-2 "For higher output voltages, additional phase boost can be achieved by adding a feed forward capacitor (C7) in parallel with R2." | 17 |
| • | Added Application Information for the TPS563200 device | 22 |
| • | Added Table 8-3 | 22 |
| **Changes from Revision * (January 2014) to Revision A (January 2014)** |  | **Page** |
| • | Changed the device status From: Product Preview To: Production | 1 |
```
This looks correct. I'll remove the extra empty column in the first rows to make it cleaner, effectively merging the first two columns for the description.
Actually, the first two columns are distinct: one for the bullet, one for the text. But in markdown tables, it's hard to merge cells. I'll just put the bullet and text in one cell.

Revised table structure:
| Description | Page |
| --- | --- |
| • Changed ... | 10 |
...
| **Changes from Revision A (January 2014) to Revision B (July 2014)** | **Page** |
| • Added ... | 1 |
...
| **Changes from Revision * (January 2014) to Revision A (January 2014)** | **Page** |
| • Changed ... | 1 |

This is much cleaner. I will use this format.
One detail: "Changed $V_{OUT}$ = 5 V To $V_{OUT}$ = 3.3 V". The image uses subscripts. I will use LaTeX formatting for subscripts to be precise. $V_{OUT}$.
Also, the image has "Figure 6-15", "Figure 6-16", "Table 8-2", etc. I will keep these as text.
The image has "2A/3A Synchronous Step-Down.. To:". Note the double dots. I will include them.
The image has "25°C". I will use $25^{\circ}$C.

Final check on the bottom section header: "Changes from Revision * (January 2014) to Revision A (January 2014)". Yes, there is an asterisk.

Okay, ready to write.
One final check on the first section. It doesn't have a header row like the others. It just starts with the list. I will treat it as part of the same table for continuity.
The "Page" column header appears next to the "Changes from Revision A..." row. So the first 5 rows don't have a header, or rather, the header is implicit. I will add a generic header for the whole table to make it valid markdown.
Header: | Description | Page |
This works for all rows.

Wait, looking at the image again, the first 5 rows are separate from the "Changes from Revision A..." section. They are just a list of changes. The "Page" column aligns with the "Changes from Revision A..." section. It's possible the first 5 rows are just a list and not part of the table structure that follows. However, for a single markdown output, combining them into one table is the most logical way to represent the data.

Let's do this.
```markdown
|  |  | Page |
| --- | --- | --- |
| • | Changed $V_{OUT}$ = 5 V To $V_{OUT}$ = 3.3 V in Figure 6-15 | 10 |
| • | Changed the X axis From: Junction Temperature To: Ambient Temperature in Figure 6-16 | 10 |
| • | Added a NOTE to the Application and Implementation section | 15 |
| • | Changed column heading $C8 + C9$ ($\mu$F) To: $C5 + C6$ ($\mu$F) in Table 8-2 | 17 |
| • | Changed
